## Increment
<!-- Which increment does this issue belong to? Add the matching inc-N label.
     Issues within an increment are completed before the next increment starts.
     Leave blank if this repo doesn't use increments. -->
`inc-`

## Objective
<!-- What should be different after this ticket is done? One or two sentences. -->


## Context
<!-- What does the agent need to know to do this work?
     - Which files / modules are relevant?
     - Are there dependencies on other tickets? (link them)
     - Any background that is not obvious from the codebase? -->


## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Concrete, testable conditions. The agent will not open a PR until all of these are met. -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Out of Scope
<!-- Explicitly list anything the agent should NOT do, to prevent overreach. -->
- 

## Assumptions Allowed
<!-- Can the agent make minor assumptions and document them, or must it ask for every ambiguity? -->
- [ ] Minor assumptions allowed — agent documents them in the PR
- [ ] No assumptions — agent must ask before proceeding if anything is unclear

## Notes for the Agent
<!-- Optional: hints, preferred approach, links to documentation, known pitfalls. -->
